allow: Bash(rm -f public/favicon-preview.png scripts/favicon.ico scripts/favicon.svg scripts/apple-touch-icon.png scripts/favicon-preview.png)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const f='dist/portfolio/browser/index.html';let s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const add='<link rel=\\"icon\\" type=\\"image/x-icon\\" href=\\"favicon.ico\\" sizes=\\"any\\"><link rel=\\"icon\\" type=\\"image/svg+xml\\" href=\\"favicon.svg\\"><link rel=\\"apple-touch-icon\\" href=\\"apple-touch-icon.png\\">';s=s.replace\('<link rel=\\"icon\\" type=\\"image/x-icon\\" href=\\"favicon.ico\\">',add\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,s\);console.log\('updated, apple-touch present:',s.includes\('apple-touch-icon'\)\);")
